title: DePhoegons' Reclaim
description: Color & block expansion on a vanilla like way
body:
Reclaiming Resources from spare weapons, Tools, & armors. Expansions on Slabs, Stairs, Walls, Fences, & Fence Gates.
- Sands, Sandstones, leaves, logs, woods, & Misc Expanded - Sands & Sandstones remade visually == Thanks to AtticusJay (Credits in Source) [1.5+] Will function Without the following mods [But is meant to be included with them] -jei
1.18.2 -> 1.18.2-9.7.0.196
1.19.2 -> 1.19.2-11.5.0.297
1.19.3 -> 1.19.3-12.2.0.17

1.20 / 1.20.1 -> 46 + =========== CurseForge / Modrinth - DePhoegons' Reclaim
-- [CurseForge](https://legacy.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/dephoegons-reclaim)
-- Modrinth Chocobo Extension mod DePhoegons' Chocobos
- Extends with this mod in intent. ========== For those who need to add recipes for other modded items.
Blank Datapack provided as 'additional' files for each version Datapack to exist on the server&client.
Examples are in Txt format
